title: Heltec wifi lora esp 32 v1 (the old one, not the tracker)

messages.author: ratratrat
messages.text: Here is how I got it to work in case anyone else ends up in the same position. clone the git, set up VScode and platformio on your maschine. edit vartiants/heltec_v2/platformio.ini line 3 to: board = heltec_wifi_lora_32 add this line: board_build.partitions = min_spiffs.csv set environment to heltec_v2 and compile and upload. done.
messages.content_html: Here is how I got it to work in case anyone else ends up in the same position. clone the git, set up VScode and platformio on your maschine. edit vartiants/heltec_v2/platformio.ini line 3 to: board = heltec_wifi_lora_32 add this line: board_build.partitions = min_spiffs.csv set environment to heltec_v2 and compile and upload. done.
messages.reactions_html: 2

messages.author: Lieven B
messages.text: Thank you, I was able to flash two V1's, one as a repeater and one as a companion. For the companion, I also lowered OFFLINE_QUEUE_SIZE build flag to 64 in the Heltec_v2_companion_radio_ble section.
messages.content_html: Thank you, I was able to flash two V1's, one as a repeater and one as a companion. For the companion, I also lowered OFFLINE_QUEUE_SIZE build flag to 64 in the Heltec_v2_companion_radio_ble section.

messages.author: Lieven B
messages.text: This is the queue size fix I found. https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/pull/1336/commits/6bb4f323cfb7f4414648e0a3d827269f01344d49
messages.content_html: This is the queue size fix I found. https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/pull/1336/commits/6bb4f323cfb7f4414648e0a3d827269f01344d49
